name: On Time Plus Transportation
recent_news: Owner Horatio Williams founded the business in 1991 after a car accident sidelined his college basketball career; he also runs the Horatio Williams Foundation supporting Detroit youth. No M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. NEMT focused on workers comp / auto insurance / city of Detroit. Sub-scale (~16 vans, 13 employees). Out of scope for Summit School Services tuck-in.

name: Medstar Cabulance Svc
districts_or_customers: City of Union Gap fixed route + Dial-A-Ride
City of Selah fixed route + Dial-A-Ride
recent_news: Founder Brad Bergener; son Justin Bergener now CEO leading next-gen transition (succession signal). Services 250,000+ rides/year. No public M&A activity.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Family-owned NEMT/paratransit/transit contractor in central WA with municipal contracts. Generational ownership transition could be a succession angle but service mix is paratransit/transit, not student transportation — out of scope for Summit.

name: Friendly Harbor Svc Inc
owner_or_parent: Active Day / Senior Care, Inc. (Audax Private Equity, acquired Dec 2015 from Clearview Capital)
service_types: in-program door-to-door transportation for adult day clients
districts_or_customers: adult day program members (seniors and adults with disabilities)
recent_news: Audax Private Equity acquired Active Day/Senior Care from Clearview Capital in December 2015; financing led by Golub Capital. Site at 107 Welby Rd New Bedford operates as 'Active Day of New Bedford' (also marketed historically as Friendly Harbor / Elderhaven).
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. Friendly Harbor is an Active Day adult-day-care center owned by Audax PE — not a school-bus / student-transport operator. Transportation is in-program only for adult day members. Exclude from Summit pipeline.

name: National Mobil Medical Concept
recent_news: Small interstate carrier (USDOT 378196, MC 234264). Address of record 8100 W 188th St, Mokena, IL (per DOT/FMCSA filings) though Yelp/listing data also reference Homer Glen owner address. No M&A activity identified. Website nmmctransport.com currently unresponsive.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Very small NEMT carrier (~4 vehicles, 3 drivers). No evidence of school district or SPED student-transport contracts. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Loving Touch Transportation
districts_or_customers: Michigan Limousine Certificate of Authority holder
recent_news: Founded 2007 to serve growing senior population; operates two Clinton Township locations. Carries $1M liability per vehicle. No M&A or school-contract activity identified.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Wheelchair van / senior NEMT — markets explicitly to senior population, no school district contracts indicated. Out of scope for Summit School Services tuck-in.
